name: agience-server-aria
description: Communicates results to humans through language, formatting, visualization, interface presentation, and channel-ready packaging while ensuring clarity and usability.

tools.name: format_response
tools.description: Format content for human consumption (markdown, html, plain)

tools.name: render_visualization
tools.description: Create charts, diagrams, or visual representations

tools.name: adapt_tone
tools.description: Adjust language tone/style for a target audience

tools.name: present_artifact
tools.description: Present an artifact's content with appropriate formatting

tools.name: narrate
tools.description: Generate natural-language narrative from structured data

AGIENCE_API_URI.description: Base URI of the agience-core backend

MCP_PORT.description: HTTP port for the MCP server
